title: lepidocupania mouana
side_effects: Lepidocupania mouana can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Overuse of the plant may also lead to allergic reactions, resulting in skin irritation, hives, and respiratory problems. Furthermore, improper use of Lepidocupania mouana has been linked to liver damage and kidney strain, particularly in individuals with pre-existing health conditions. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant can cause seizures, coma, and even death.
